name: commit-commands
description: Codex-native skills matching Anthropic's commit, commit-push-pr, and clean_gone workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Anthropic commit commands adapted as Codex skills.
interface.longDescription: A native Codex skill adaptation of Anthropic's commit-commands plugin. It preserves the original commit, commit-push-pr, and forceful clean_gone workflows while adding Codex-native invocation and Codex attribution.
defaultPrompt: Create one commit for my current changes.
Commit my changes, push the branch, and open a pull request.
Force-clean local branches whose upstream is gone.
